title: create: tinker's magic
description: a combination of a bunch of mods including Tinker's construct and create.
body:
create: tinker's Magic is a mod pack that makes Minecraft more custom and creative. From the custom weapon and tool of Tinker's construct to the problem-solving of the create mod. you can also explore vast worlds of dragons and mermaids with the ice and fire mod(the waystones will help a ton!). Create machines and devices that will help you throughout your adventures and just everyday things. the Amro(u)rs and tools you can make will be of use when mining and spelunking. Use some blood magic to improve your gameplay as well. you should install this mod pack if you like Create, Tinker's Construct, and Ice and Fire.

 

links:

modrinth

curseforge

 

main mods(not fps improvers)

  • Create
  • Tinker construct
  • Construct armory
  • Ice and Fire
  • Blood magic
  • Waystones
  • Blood smeltery
  • Pretty pipes
  • Simple Voice Chat
  • Mystical Agriculture
  • Mystical Agradditions
  • and more!



Disclaimer: Some of the enemies may be super hard to defeat and some mods are super complex, probably best if you learn more about the mods before you download.
